title: Father’s Curse
description:
You return home after your father calls you… only to find the house empty and wrong.



He tried to use dark magic to bring back your dead mother, but something went terribly wrong.



The house is now filled with hostile spirits and locked secrets. Explore the environment, find hidden keys, unlock doors, and descend into the basement to uncover the truth behind the curse.



Features:

• First-person psychological horror experience

• Explore a haunted family home

• Search for keys and hidden clues

• Solve environmental puzzles

• Encounter supernatural entities

• Atmospheric sound design and jump scares

• Uncover the story behind your father's ritual

• Multiple frightening events throughout the house
description_short: A horror game about a son who returns to his haunted family home after a call from his father, only to discover that dark rituals have turned the house into a place filled with spirits, danger, and darkness
